name: Twyla and Company
tagline: Trendy, artistic, custom color and shear work in downtown Santa Rosa.
seoDescription: Twyla & Co. is a hair salon in downtown Santa Rosa offering master color, custom cuts, styling and lash services.

about.heading: About Twyla and Company
body: Twyla & Co. is a hair salon in downtown Santa Rosa at 529 5th Street. Founder Twyla Lawrence and her team provide friendly, personalized service through a group of highly skilled and creative professionals, with a focus on trendy, artistic, custom color and shear work.

The salon team includes master colorists and stylists Rod Schmittou and Holly Millon-Maskell, a fine-hair expert, along with lash artist Alexis Samuels. They work with premium product lines including Milbon, Olaplex and Kevin Murphy, and offer free consultations.

items.quote: Twyla is wonderful. She is professional and amazing. Her salon is darling.
items.author: Deana F.

items.quote: Twyla knows my hair, communicates well & takes great feedback in terms of what I want.
items.author: Candice H.

items.quote: I always love my hair after I visit Twyla! My blonde she fixed for me is my favorite color.
items.author: Sofia M.

items.a: Hours can vary — give us a call at 707.481.7012 and we'll let you know when we're open.
We proudly serve Santa Rosa, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at 707.481.7012 — we're glad to help.
